sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Fezi-Copter Hat
special_mechanics.description: Power-up that enables Gomez to fly. Item disintegrates upon entering a new door.

special_mechanics.name: Speed Shoes
special_mechanics.description: Power-up that increases Gomez's movement speed. Persists across doors.

special_mechanics.name: Stomping Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Gomez can kill enemies and bosses by stomping on them, similar to Mario games.

special_mechanics.name: Sword Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Weapon collectible that persists across doors.

special_mechanics.name: Golf Club Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Weapon that shoots balls. Persists across doors.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Sources contain gameplay descriptions but no precise physics parameters, sub-pixel system details, or quantified movement values. Movement is documented qualitatively through power-up effects and gameplay mechanics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Addams Family (SNES)
